title: olearia cassiniae
intro: Olearia cassiniae, also known as the New Caledonian tree daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Olearia cassiniae include reducing inflammation, alleviating fever, and treating respiratory infections, as well as soothing digestive issues and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Olearia cassiniae include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
